name: explore
description: Search the X (Twitter) API spec for endpoints. No network calls - runs against an in-memory endpoint catalog covering tweet search, user lookup, media download, monitoring, giveaways, composition, and more.

arguments.name: code
arguments.desc: Async arrow function to search the API spec. Sandbox provides spec.endpoints array with method, path, summary, category, free, parameters, and responseShape fields.

name: xquik
description: Execute X (Twitter) API calls. Covers 120 endpoints: tweet search, user lookup, follower extraction, write actions (tweet, like, retweet, follow, DM), monitoring, giveaway draws, trending topics, composition, and more.

arguments.name: code
arguments.desc: Async arrow function to execute API calls. Sandbox provides xquik(method, path, options?) for making authenticated requests to the Xquik API.
